jobs.description:
I need a single, well-structured Excel workbook that handles two connected tasks:

1. Invoice generation  
The first sheet should let me enter—or, even better, pull in automatically—customer information, product details, quantities, rates and payment terms. A clean “Generate” button should compile those inputs into a nicely formatted invoice, then save each invoice as an individual PDF file in a folder of my choosing. I want the whole flow to run with minimal clicks, so leverage formulas, VBA or Power Query for automatic data entry wherever practical.

jobs.title: Custom Graphic YouTube Thumbnail
jobs.description:
I need a single, eye-catching YouTube thumbnail built entirely from custom-designed graphics—no stock photos and no added text or logos. The goal is to make the video stand out in crowded feeds while staying perfectly legible at both full and preview sizes.

Once we begin I’ll share the video link, a short creative brief, and any brand colours to weave into the design. You’ll turn that into a bold, scroll-stopping image that meets YouTube’s 1280 × 720, 16:9, under-2 MB requirements.

jobs.title: Simple, Clean Video Editing Needed
jobs.description:
I have a collection of videos that don’t fit neatly into the usual “corporate,” “YouTube,” or “event” labels, yet they all share one common goal: they must look polished, seamless, and uncluttered. I’m looking for an editor who can take raw footage of varying subjects and shape it into a cohesive final product with a simple, clean feel—no flashy effects, just thoughtful pacing, smooth cuts, and an overall professional finish.

jobs.title: Wedding Photo Color Correction -- 2
jobs.description:
I have a batch of roughly 50-200 wedding images that need careful, consistent color correction. I’d like the finished files to stay true to the original lighting and mood while removing any obvious color casts, ensuring skin tones look natural, and giving the full set a unified feel that will print beautifully for an album.

Please send at least one before-and-after example from a recent wedding job so I can see how you handle exposure, white balance, and tone. JPEG previews are fine at this stage. If we move forward, I’ll supply the RAW files (Canon CR2) through WeTransfer and expect high-res

jobs.title: Realistic Historical Board Game Cover Art
jobs.description:
I'm looking for a talented artist to create a realistic artwork for my historical board game cover. The artwork should capture the essence of the game's theme and intrigue potential players.

Key Requirements:
- Realistic art style
- Historical theme
- Inclusion of important symbols

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Strong portfolio in realistic artwork
- Experience in creating board game covers
- Knowledge of historical themes and symbols

Please provide samples of similar work. Looking forward to your bids!
